title: ored up
description: makes every ore ever generate much more
body:
# But what does it do?
Well, it makes every ore spawn more in the overworld to the point that you won't find stone ever

# But will I get more diamonds?
well probably yes but it'll be a lot more annoying to mine through all the ores instead of stone. Oh and emeralds still only spawn in mountain biomes...

And also it doesn't do the nether...
# Why would I install this? Like ever?
I DONT KNOW. you'll never find stone or deepslate and this wont be in a big survival world, it'll be fun for like 10 minutes.
## oh and:
see gallery for gallery

made with miscode https://misode.github.io/customized/?tab=basic

yes, it's pretty cheap... But it works

I have trauma's on descriptions so I'm making this one very detailed

used photopea to make the icon, wont leave a link but just google it
